message:
Refine SSI validation and update beads tracking

- Update fsqlite-mvcc ssi_validation.rs serializable snapshot
  isolation logic
- Update beads issue tracker state

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@
 {"id":"bd-1dp9.6","title":"Track 6: Extreme Optimization and Performance Parity","description":"## Context
Parity without performance is unacceptable; optimization without proof is dangerous.

## Goal
Achieve performance parity targets using strict profile-first, isomorphism-preserving optimization loops.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Baselines + flamegraphs + opportunity matrix published.
- Only score>=2.0 optimizations implemented.
- Every optimization has isomorphism proof + golden checksum verification.
- Final perf parity report includes p50/p95/p99 and throughput deltas.

## Success Criteria
Epic completion requires all child beads to satisfy their structured acceptance criteria, including explicit unit/property coverage, deterministic e2e evidence, and structured logging/metrics validation.","acceptance_criteria":"1. Every child bead in this epic defines concrete unit/property test scope with deterministic pass/fail thresholds and invariant IDs. 2. Critical-path end-to-end scenarios are implemented as reproducible e2e scripts (fixed seeds, replay commands, artifact bundles) across happy-path and adversarial-path behavior. 3. Structured logging and metrics contracts are mandatory for all child outputs (trace_id, run_id, scenario_id, seed, timing, outcome, error context) and validated by CI conformance checks. 4. Epic completion requires a machine-readable evidence manifest linking child unit/e2e/log artifacts to acceptance outcomes, plus an explicit fallback/rollback plan that preserves concurrent-writer defaults.","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-13T02:02:23.366156385Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-14T00:37:10.406157176Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["alien-pass-2026-02-13","ev-gated","isomorphism","optimization","parity100","performance"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1633,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Track 6 operating notes:
- Apply extreme optimization discipline without semantic drift.
- Optimization work is gated by profile evidence and behavior-preservation proof.

Design choices:
- Mandatory loop: baseline -> profile -> opportunity matrix -> single-lever change -> golden/isomorphism proof -> reprofile.
- Only execute opportunities with Impact*Confidence/Effort >= threshold defined in T6.1 policy.
- Keep SQL-path and storage/MVCC-path optimization streams separated for attribution clarity.

Test/logging requirements:
- Benchmark artifacts include p50/p95/p99, throughput, and memory deltas.
- Golden output checksum validation before/after each optimization set.
- Isomorphism proof notes attached per optimization change set.

Definition of done:
- Performance parity target met with explicit non-regression evidence and CI guardrails.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T02:11:25Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1dp9.6.1","title":"T6.1 Baseline benchmark pack + profiling + opportunity matrix","description":"Capture p50/p95/p99/throughput baselines and flamegraphs for representative parity workloads; build scored opportunity matrix (impact×confidence/effort). Acceptance: only score>=2.0 opportunities promoted.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-13T02:02:31.734533691Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T09:43:56.920755426Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T09:43:56.920736691Z","close_reason":"Completed: baseline benchmark pack runner + verifier + threshold-gated opportunity matrix with unit/e2e/log evidence attached","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["baseline","parity100","perf","profiling"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.1.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.1","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":1634,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Mandatory Verification Contract (applies to this bead)

This task is not complete until evidence is attached for all three layers:
1. **Unit tests**: deterministic tests proving local semantics/invariants for the changed surface.
2. **E2E scripts**: scenario-level scripts exercising realistic flows and differential behavior where applicable.
3. **Structured logging artifacts**: machine-parseable logs with run_id, seed/config, phase markers, first-divergence indicators (when relevant), and artifact hashes.

Minimum evidence bundle:
- test identifiers + pass/fail summary,
- reproduction command(s),
- output artifact locations/hashes,
- short rationale linking evidence to acceptance criteria.

Gate policy:
- Missing any one of the three layers = bead remains open.
- Evidence must be reproducible on a clean checkout with pinned config/seeds.
","created_at":"2026-02-13T03:12:31Z"},{"id":1635,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.1","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Verification evidence bundle for bd-1dp9.6.1 (baseline benchmark pack + profiling + opportunity matrix):

1) Unit tests (deterministic invariants)
- Command: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/cargo-target-silentwolf-1dp961 cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test perf_loop_enforcement -- --nocapture
- Result: PASS (35 passed, 0 failed)
- Includes acceptance guard: test_e2e_only_threshold_qualified_opportunities_promoted

2) E2E script (scenario-level)
- Command: ./scripts/verify_perf_baseline_pack.sh
- Successful runs recorded in structured log:
  - run_id=bd-1dp9.6.1-20260213T093157Z-319985 -> stage=runner complete + stage=complete verification succeeded
  - run_id=bd-1dp9.6.1-20260213T093452Z-375461 -> stage=runner complete + stage=complete verification succeeded
- Re-run attempt at 2026-02-13T09:41Z is currently blocked by unrelated concurrent-tree compile regressions in fsqlite-vdbe/vectorized.rs (outside this bead scope).

3) Structured logging + artifacts (machine-parseable)
- report: artifacts/perf/bd-1dp9.6.1/report.json
  - sha256=9c0b9f43d70094788859390c8023ac27e7b5566aa7b0548c6427c6c3e11845ca
  - bead_id=bd-1dp9.6.1 overall_pass=true scenario_count=7 promoted_count=6
- opportunity matrix: artifacts/perf/bd-1dp9.6.1/opportunity_matrix.json
  - sha256=6fb75ee9716b0c9ab3c720489af0a7ec208edb13a472f40946c53fbc89b27f24
  - threshold=2.0; promoted candidates all selected=true and score>=threshold; at least one non-promoted candidate present
- summary: artifacts/perf/bd-1dp9.6.1/summary.md
  - sha256=3c2a356f278666edd713325da7fa93499251de5222a319e07b507695dcef7779
- profiling artifact report: artifacts/perf/bd-1dp9.6.1/profiling_artifact_report.json
  - sha256=764506d87a6019dd4ace25a1342ed1f2fc4e94bac2a5b5ee5627e4e675ebc572
- baseline outputs:
  - baselines/criterion/bd-1dp9.6.1-baseline.json sha256=cda76a92e912f2c3062c07b3fcb486a7fce45d4bba68e59e817aabd2eb4ba710
  - baselines/smoke/bd-1dp9.6.1-smoke-report.json sha256=48162121960df0c4914f4e911c57fe525ce7d1a2c228bfa95f35410cb5e8823c
  - baselines/hyperfine/bd-1dp9.6.1-hyperfine.json sha256=849f61130424478788b19dedffce6215b896101ef754041b6a95af8d08faae13
- script log: artifacts/perf/bd-1dp9.6.1/verify_perf_baseline_pack.log
  - sha256=9de2cacb89dd2478502a3b4e9a84f7f37422c2cc8f3fd54a1a5e0df5f6da8a42

Acceptance rationale:
- Baseline benchmark pack and profiling artifacts are generated deterministically.
- Opportunity matrix gate enforces only score>=2.0 promotions, with below-threshold candidates retained as non-promoted.
- Unit + e2e + structured logging evidence are attached with reproducible commands and artifact hashes.","created_at":"2026-02-13T09:43:49Z"}]}
 {"id":"bd-1dp9.6.2","title":"T6.2 SQL pipeline hotspot optimization sprints (single lever, proof-preserving)","description":"Run iterative optimization loops on parser/planner/VDBE hotspots with one lever per change. Implementation is behaviorally correct against explicit invariants and edge-case requirements, including fault and recovery paths where applicable. 2. Comprehensive unit/property tests cover normal, boundary, and adversarial conditions with deterministic fixtures and regression seeds. 3. Starting with profile-guided hotspot selection in SQL pipeline (parser/planner/VDBE), then implementing exactly one optimization lever with behavior-preserving checks, deterministic unit/e2e evidence, and structured logs per acceptance contract.","created_at":"2026-02-20T01:46:11Z"},{"id":3120,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.2","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"Progress update (2026-02-20): delivered first concrete optimization-governance slice for this bead. In crates/fsqlite-harness/src/sql_pipeline_optimization.rs, assessment now enforces a real SQL hotspot gate sourced from T6.1 opportunity matrix artifact (artifacts/perf/bd-1dp9.6.1/opportunity_matrix.json) instead of pure static checks, recording selected_sql_hotspots + matrix scenario/threshold in report output and failing parity if SQL hotspot selection/isomorphism gate does not hold. Added new unit tests for gate pass/fail fixtures and deterministic structured artifact emission (SQL_PIPELINE_OPT_ARTIFACT_JSON + SQL_PIPELINE_OPT_REPORT_JSON lines). Added deterministic e2e script e2e/bd_1dp9_6_2_sql_pipeline_optimization_report.sh with structured JSONL run report/logs and artifact extraction fallback for rch remote artifact locality. Validation: rch exec cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib sql_pipeline_optimization::tests:: -- --nocapture PASS (17 tests); ./e2e/bd_1dp9_6_2_sql_pipeline_optimization_report.sh --json PASS with run_id=bd-1dp9.6.2-20260220T020437Z-3913021 report_sha256=5bac2319218e050df1c9c5525bedda760bc5185833135f87404d757b9c3fb0f1. Workspace-wide rch cargo check/clippy currently blocked by pre-existing frankentui compile errors (outside bead files).","created_at":"2026-02-20T02:09:21Z"}]}

Baseline (before lever): incoming active_readers/4 1.56-1.60us, /8 3.44-3.47us, /16 6.67-6.74us; outgoing committed_writers/4 1.48-1.49us, /8 3.17-3.25us, /16 6.11-6.18us. Lever tested: replace per-call page index structure in discover_incoming_edges/discover_outgoing_edges from BTreeMap to HashMap with preallocation. Result: statistically significant regression across all sizes (roughly +21% to +52% latency). Change was fully reverted; codebase left with no performance-regressing behavior changes. Validation after revert: cargo fmt --check -p fsqlite-mvcc; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-quietwillow-mvcc cargo clippy -p fsqlite-mvcc --all-targets -- -D warnings; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-quietwillow-mvcc cargo test -p fsqlite-mvcc ssi_validation::tests::test_ -- --nocapture; CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/cargo-target-quietwillow-mvcc cargo test -p fsqlite-mvcc begin_concurrent::tests::test_fcw_deterministic_tiebreak_lower_txn_id_wins -- --nocapture.","created_at":"2026-02-13T20:52:41Z"},{"id":1637,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.3","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Mandatory Verification Contract (applies to this bead)

 {"id":"bd-1dp9.6.5","title":"T6.5 Isomorphism-proof harness and golden checksum automation for optimization changes","description":"Operationalize optimization safety: every performance change must carry proof that behavior is preserved. Build harnesses that snapshot canonical outputs pre/post change, compute and compare golden checksums, and emit machine-readable isomorphism proof records (ordering/tie-break/precision/RNG invariants). Acceptance: (1) unit tests for proof record generation and checksum integrity, (2) e2e optimization-run scripts that produce before/after artifact bundles, (3) structured logs for benchmark deltas and proof verdicts, (4) CI policy that blocks optimization merges without valid proof artifacts.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","owner":"JadeFinch","created_at":"2026-02-13T03:11:25.472449376Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-13T20:34:59.989992453Z","closed_at":"2026-02-13T20:34:59.989927121Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["e2e","isomorphism","logging","optimization","parity100","unit-tests"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.6","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""},{"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.5","depends_on_id":"bd-1dp9.6.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-13T18:22:58Z","created_by":"import","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}],"comments":[{"id":2993,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## bd-1dp9.6.5 Closure Evidence: Isomorphism-proof harness and golden checksum automation

### Summary
Full parity across all 10 proof invariant classes, including all 4 mandatory invariants (golden_checksum, error_codes, null_propagation, aggregate_semantics). SHA-256 golden checksum automation with CI gate enforcement.

### Implementation
- crates/fsqlite-harness/src/isomorphism_proof.rs (orchestrator module)
  - ProofInvariantClass enum (10 classes: row_ordering, tie_break, floating_point_precision, rng_determinism, golden_checksum, type_affinity, null_propagation, error_codes, aggregate_semantics, window_function_semantics)
  - IsomorphismVerdict (Parity, Partial, Drift)
  - IsomorphismProofRecord for machine-readable proof records
  - 20 individual checks across 10 invariant classes
  - assess_isomorphism_proof() orchestrator + file I/O + triage_line
  - 17 unit tests

### Evidence
1) Harness unit (17p/0f): cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib -- isomorphism_proof
2) Harness integration (11p/0f): cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --test bd_1dp9_6_5_isomorphism_proof
3) Toolchain determinism (58p/0f): cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib -- toolchain_determinism
4) Ratchet policy (25p/0f): cargo test -p fsqlite-harness --lib -- ratchet_policy
5) E2E script: PASS (111 total, 0 failed). Artifact: test-results/bd-1dp9.6.5-isomorphism-proof-verify.json
","created_at":"2026-02-13T20:34:59Z"},{"id":1639,"issue_id":"bd-1dp9.6.5","author":"Dicklesworthstone","text":"## Mandatory Verification Contract (applies to this bead)

This task is not complete until evidence is attached for all three layers:
1. **Unit tests**: deterministic tests proving local semantics/invariants for the changed surface.
2. **E2E scripts**: scenario-level scripts exercising realistic flows and differential behavior where applicable.
3. **Structured logging artifacts**: machine-parseable logs with run_id, seed/config, phase markers, first-divergence indicators (when relevant), and artifact hashes.

Minimum evidence bundle:
- test identifiers + pass/fail summary,
- reproduction command(s),
- output artifact locations/hashes,
- short rationale linking evidence to acceptance criteria.

Gate policy:
- Missing any one of the three layers = bead remains open.
- Evidence must be reproducible on a clean checkout with pinned config/seeds.

 {"id":"bd-1dp9.6.6","title":"Alien Contract Pack: EV/risk/fallback enforcement across all open beads","description":"Change: Apply a mandatory recommendation-contract schema to every open bead (EV score, risk gate, budgeted mode, fallback trigger, baseline comparator, proof artifacts).\n\nHotspot evidence: bv --robot-triage shows 186 open / 104 actionable with critical bottlenecks in MVCC GC, Parallel WAL, vectorization, and release gates.\n\nMapped graveyard sections: 0.1, 0.2, 0.3, 0.4, 0.19, 0.20, 0.25, 0.30; summary sections for FrankenSQLite optimization queue.\n\nEV score: (Impact 5 * Confidence 4 * Reuse 5) / (Effort 3 * Friction 2) = 16.67\nPriority tier: S\nAdoption wedge: additive metadata + labels first; no runtime behavior change required.\nBudgeted mode: Cap per-session contract pass to 40 beads; on exhaustion carry remaining IDs in deterministic queue ordered by triage score.\nExpected-loss model: states={complete_contract,incomplete_contract}; actions={enforce,defer}; losses favor enforce for P0/P1 bottlenecks.\nCalibration + fallback trigger: if update automation causes dependency cycles or stale IDs, fallback to manual triage-by-track updates only.\nIsomorphism proof plan: issue graph semantics unchanged except explicit metadata labels/dependencies; no status mutation without explicit action.\np50/p95/p99 target: reduce triage-to-action latency by 30/40/50%.\nPrimary risk + countermeasure: Over-annotation noise -> enforce concise schema and high-impact-first policy.\nRepro artifact pack: env.json + triage JSON + command transcript + .beads export via br sync --flush-only.\nPrimary paper status: hypothesis/read pending for each derived alien primitive; checklist attached in child tasks.\nInterference test: required when composing multiple adaptive controllers in one bead cluster.\nDemo linkage: parity navigator + release-readiness gate output.\nRollback: remove labels/deps added in this pass.\nBaseline comparator: previous backlog without contract metadata.

## Acceptance Criteria
Canonical pass/fail contract is tracked in the issue's structured `acceptance_criteria` field. This section is kept in sync for template conformance and planning hygiene.","acceptance_criteria":"1.
